scripts.cluster:up: (kind get clusters 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^lattik$' || kind create cluster --name lattik --config k8s/kind-config.yaml) && kubectl apply -f k8s/namespaces.yaml
scripts.db:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/postgres.yaml && until kubectl -n postgres get pod -l app=postgres 2>/dev/null | grep -q postgres; do sleep 2; done && kubectl -n postgres wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=postgres --timeout=120s
scripts.gitea:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea.yaml && until kubectl -n gitea get pod -l app=gitea 2>/dev/null | grep -q gitea; do sleep 2; done && kubectl -n gitea wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=gitea --timeout=120s && (kubectl -n gitea exec deploy/gitea -- su git -c 'gitea admin user create --admin --username lattik-admin --password lattik-local --email admin@lattik.local --must-change-password=false' 2>/dev/null || true) && kubectl -n gitea delete job gitea-init --ignore-not-found && kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea-init.yaml && kubectl -n gitea wait --for=condition=complete job/gitea-init --timeout=120s
scripts.gitea:stop: kubectl delete -f k8s/gitea-init.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/gitea.yaml --ignore-not-found
scripts.trino:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/minio.yaml && kubectl -n minio wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=minio --timeout=120s && kubectl -n minio wait --for=condition=complete job/minio-init --timeout=120s && kubectl apply -f k8s/iceberg-rest.yaml && kubectl -n iceberg wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=iceberg-rest --timeout=120s && kubectl apply -f k8s/trino.yaml && kubectl -n trino wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=trino --timeout=300s && echo 'Trino ready at http://localhost:8080 (MinIO console: http://localhost:9001)'
scripts.trino:stop: kubectl delete -f k8s/trino.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/iceberg-rest.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/minio.yaml --ignore-not-found
scripts.kafka:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/kafka.yaml && until kubectl -n kafka get pod -l app=kafka 2>/dev/null | grep -q kafka; do sleep 2; done && kubectl -n kafka wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=kafka --timeout=120s && echo 'Kafka ready — in-cluster: kafka.kafka:9092, host: localhost:9094 (port-forward or recreate cluster)'
scripts.schema-registry:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/schema-registry.yaml && until kubectl -n schema-registry get pod -l app=schema-registry 2>/dev/null | grep -q schema-registry; do sleep 2; done && kubectl -n schema-registry wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=schema-registry --timeout=300s && echo 'Schema Registry ready — in-cluster: sr.schema-registry:8081, host: localhost:8081'
scripts.ingest:image-build: docker build -t lattik/ingest:latest -f apps/ingest/Dockerfile apps/ingest && kind load docker-image lattik/ingest:latest --name lattik
scripts.ingest:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/ingest.yaml && until kubectl -n workloads get pod -l app=ingest 2>/dev/null | grep -q ingest; do sleep 2; done && kubectl -n workloads wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=ingest --timeout=120s && echo 'Ingest ready — in-cluster: ingest.workloads:8090, host: localhost:8090'
scripts.spark:image-build: docker build -t lattik/spark-iceberg:4.0.2-1.10.1 -f k8s/spark/Dockerfile . && kind load docker-image lattik/spark-iceberg:4.0.2-1.10.1 --name lattik
scripts.spark:start: (helm repo add spark-operator https://kubeflow.github.io/spark-operator 2>/dev/null || true) && helm repo update spark-operator >/dev/null && helm upgrade --install spark-operator spark-operator/spark-operator --namespace spark-operator --values k8s/spark/operator-values.yaml --wait --timeout 5m && kubectl apply -f k8s/spark-rbac.yaml && echo 'Spark Operator ready (SparkApplications go in the workloads namespace)'
scripts.spark:stop: helm uninstall spark-operator --namespace spark-operator --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/spark-rbac.yaml --ignore-not-found
scripts.spark-drivers:sync: kubectl create configmap spark-drivers --namespace=workloads --from-file=k8s/spark/drivers/ --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
scripts.airflow:image-build: docker build -t lattik/airflow:3.2.0 -f k8s/airflow/Dockerfile . && kind load docker-image lattik/airflow:3.2.0 --name lattik
scripts.airflow:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/airflow.yaml && kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/airflow-init --timeout=300s && pnpm airflow:dags-sync && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=airflow-api-server --timeout=300s && echo 'Airflow ready at http://localhost:8088 (no credentials — click Sign In)'
scripts.airflow:dags-sync: for f in airflow/dags/*; do docker cp "$f" lattik-control-plane:/var/local/airflow-dags/; done && echo 'DAGs synced to kind node'
scripts.images:build: pnpm airflow:image-build && pnpm ingest:image-build && pnpm stitch:image-build
scripts.dev:services: pnpm images:build && pnpm gitea:start && pnpm gitea:token-sync && pnpm trino:start && pnpm kafka:start && pnpm schema-registry:start && pnpm ingest:start && pnpm spark:start && pnpm spark-drivers:sync && pnpm airflow:start && echo '✅ All services ready'
scripts.spark:submit-example: kubectl delete -f k8s/spark-example.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl apply -f k8s/spark-example.yaml && kubectl -n workloads wait --for=jsonpath='{.status.applicationState.state}'=COMPLETED sparkapplication/iceberg-demo --timeout=300s && kubectl -n workloads logs -l sparkoperator.k8s.io/app-name=iceberg-demo,spark-role=driver --tail=80
